mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM contest_problem_rel cpr INNER JOIN contest c ON cpr.contest_id = c.id WHERE c.public_id = #{contestPublicId} AND cpr.problem_id = #{problemId} AND cpr.is_del = 0 AND c.is_del = 0

SELECT c.id AS contest_id, c.is_public, c.start_time, c.end_time, CASE WHEN cmr.user_id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS manager_flag, CASE WHEN crr.user_id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS registered_flag, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM class_contest_rel ccr INNER JOIN class_member_rel cmbr ON ccr.class_id = cmbr.class_id WHERE ccr.contest_id = c.id AND ccr.is_del = 0 AND cmbr.user_id = #{userId} AND cmbr.is_del = 0 ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS class_member_flag FROM contest c LEFT JOIN contest_manager_rel cmr ON cmr.contest_id = c.id AND cmr.user_id = #{userId} AND cmr.is_del = 0 LEFT JOIN contest_register_rel crr ON crr.contest_id = c.id AND crr.user_id = #{userId} AND crr.is_del = 0 WHERE c.public_id = #{contestPublicId} AND c.is_del = 0

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM problem_set_problem_rel pspr INNER JOIN problem_set ps ON pspr.problem_set_id = ps.id WHERE ps.public_id = #{problemSetPublicId} AND pspr.problem_id = #{problemId} AND pspr.is_del = 0 AND ps.is_del = 0

SELECT ps.id AS problem_set_id, ps.is_public, CASE WHEN ps.owner_user_id = #{userId} THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS owner_flag, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM class_problem_set_rel cpsr INNER JOIN class_member_rel cmr ON cpsr.class_id = cmr.class_id WHERE cpsr.problem_set_id = ps.id AND cpsr.is_del = 0 AND cmr.user_id = #{userId} AND cmr.is_del = 0 ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS class_member_flag, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM problem_set_invited_member_rel psimr WHERE psimr.problem_set_id = ps.id AND psimr.user_id = #{userId} AND psimr.is_del = 0 ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS shared_user_flag FROM problem_set ps WHERE ps.public_id = #{problemSetPublicId} AND ps.is_del = 0
